texto: War, in some ways, is merciful to men. It makes them heroes if they are the victors. If they are the vanquished - they do not live to see their homes taken, their wives widowed. But if you are a woman - you must live through defeat...
explicacao: Orientação direta de Samhita Arni sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “War, in some ways, is merciful to men. It makes them heroes if they are the victors. If they are …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, ramayana, war, útil em momentos de war.

frase_original: War, in some ways, is merciful to men. It makes them heroes if they are the victors. If they are the vanquished - they do not live to see their homes taken, their wives widowed. But if you are a woman - you must live through defeat...
